The '''information cataloging droid''' was a model of [[Labor droid/Legends|labor droid]] produced by [[Kalibac Industries]] for the [[Mid Rim Lending Network]].

These librarian units were fitted with [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlifts]], allowing them to reach the highest shelves of data archives. They used dangling manipulator arms to retrieve information cylinders. The [[Techno Union/Legends|Techno Union]] used the information cataloging droid's internal intelligence matrices in their [[Mustafar panning droid|DLC-13 mining droids]] designed for use on [[Mustafar/Legends|Mustafar]]. The heat-resistant, [[Deflector shield/Legends|shielded]] body shell of the panning droid was modeled on that of the librarian droid.
